linear_analogue_scale.description: Patient-reported itch assessment on a 10 cm linear analogue scale, averaged over each two-day period (before, during, and after aspirin treatment). The answer notes that the data show some improvement and discusses the width of confidence intervals.

nocturnal_limb_movements.description: Nocturnal limb movements measured by a limb movement meter, averaged over each two-day period (before, during, and after aspirin treatment). The answer references the observed data showing some improvement and discusses the inadequacy of the sample size.

sample_size.description: Number of patients in the study. The answer explicitly references this as a 'small study' to argue that the authors' conclusion of excluding an aspirin effect is incorrect.
